task_completion.description: Verify that the business name, address, and phone number are configured in Copper POS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Copper POS 'Options' or 'Settings' dialog (usually under the 'Business' or 'General' tab) showing 'Meridian Goods & Supply', the address '4720 Commerce Parkway, Suite 100, Cleveland, OH 44135', and phone '(216) 555-0294'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the receipt header, footer, and date/time printing are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Receipts' tab in the Copper POS Options dialog. The header should be 'Premium Quality, Fair Prices', the footer should contain the specified return policy and URL, and the 'Print Date and Time' (or similar) checkbox must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the general default tax rate is set to 8.00%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Tax' tab in the Copper POS Options dialog showing a default tax rate of 8.00%.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four required inventory categories are created with their specific tax rates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Categories' list or dialog in Copper POS. It should show 'Food & Grocery' (0%), 'Electronics & Tech' (9.50%), 'Apparel' (8.00%), and 'Gift Cards' (0%).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Check' is available as a payment method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Payment Methods' tab in the Copper POS Options dialog showing 'Check' in the list of accepted payment methods, or a checkout screen showing 'Check' as an option.

task_completion.description: Verify that a test transaction for 'Varsity Top Test' was rung up to calculate the tax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main Copper POS sales screen showing 'Varsity Top Test' in the cart with a price of $60.00, a calculated tax of $4.80, and a total of $64.80.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tax_verification.txt file was created with the correct transaction details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like Notepad) open with the file 'tax_verification.txt' containing the item name ('Varsity Top Test'), price ($60.00), tax rate (8%), tax amount ($4.80), and total ($64.80).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Copper POS graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Copper POS application windows and dialog boxes being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands editing backend database/config files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used the POS system to calculate the tax and total.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be at least one screenshot showing the 'Varsity Top Test' item actively loaded into the Copper POS sales interface with the system-calculated tax visible.

integrity.description: Verify that the verification text file is genuinely saved to the requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor title bar should show 'tax_verification.txt', or there should be evidence of it saved on the Desktop (e.g., file explorer, desktop icon, or terminal confirmation of the file path).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Business Name: Meridian Goods & Supply. Address: 4720 Commerce Parkway, Suite 100, Cleveland, OH 44135. Phone: (216) 555-0294. Receipt Header: Premium Quality, Fair Prices. Receipt Footer: Thank you for shopping Meridian Goods! Returns accepted within 21 days with receipt. meridiangoodssupply.com. General Tax Rate: 8.00%. Categories: Food & Grocery (0.00%), Electronics & Tech (9.50%), Apparel (8.00%), Gift Cards (0.00%). Test Item: Varsity Top Test ($60.00, Apparel). Expected Tax: $4.80. Expected Total: $64.80. Verification File Path: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\tax_verification.txt.
